CustomField.description: Read Only (Hiện tại) Công thức = IF (Present Service Fee != 0, Present Service Fee, IF(Total Present Service Fee != 0, Total Present Service Fee/ (Nếu là Rent Contract - Shophouse) thì chia cho Rent Area + Outdoor Area hoặc (Nếu là Rent Contract - Shop Mall) thì chia cho Area, 0))
CustomField.label: Service Fee (VND/m2/Month)
